subject: [PATCH v1 12/17] fuse: add passthrough support for entry creation

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch adds support for passthrough operations in the FUSE file system. When creating a new entry (e.g., file or directory), it uses the extended fuse_entry2_out reply to associate the inode with a backing file if a server returns a backing ID. If no backing ID is returned, statx attributes are cached instead. This patch modifies the create_new_entry function in fs/fuse/dir.c to use the new fuse_entry2_out reply and handle passthrough operations accordingly.
